title: Conflict with multiple Xano data source instances
symptom: When attempting to publish the app, the user encounters the error 'ERROR_CREATING_CMSDATASET'. This prevents the app from being published successfully.
not_this_if: Only one instance of the Xano data source plugin is used
root_cause: The error occurs when multiple instances of the Xano data source plugin are added to the project, leading to conflicts during the publishing process. This can happen due to user error or a bug in the project setup.
fix_steps: Check the list of data source plugins
Remove any duplicate instances of the Xano data source plugin
agent_instruction: Remove duplicate instances of the Xano data source plugin from the project settings.
